title: DeepBrain AI Launches Interactive AI Video Agents for Enterprise
author: Not Specified
description: DeepBrain AI announced the launch of its B2B AI Video Agents, marking a shift from static video generation to real-time conversational avatars for enterprise use. The technology enables two-way dialogue for customer service and internal operations, with proven deployment at major clients including SAP, Shinhan Bank, and Samsung Securities. The company positions itself as focusing on functional utility and interactive intelligence rather than cinematic aesthetics.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned only as a client using DeepBrain AI's technology. No specific business impact or strategic implications are discussed in the article.
Mentioned only as a client validating DeepBrain AI's technology. No specific business impact or strategic implications are discussed.

title: South Korea Loyalty Programs Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics Report 2025: 13% CAGR Forecast During 2025-2029, with Loyalty Market in South Korea Set to Reach $2.98 Billion by 2029
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The South Korean loyalty market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 13% during 2025-2029, reaching $2.98 billion by 2029. Retail and fintech giants are leading the space, leveraging their ecosystem advantages to offer integrated and seamless rewards. Key trends include digital integration, government-backed incentives, and hyper-personalization.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Starbucks Korea's rewards system, with over 10 million members, demonstrates the effectiveness of exclusive perks in driving customer participation.
Shinhan Bank's Shinhan Fan loyalty program is highly competitive, offering reward points, cashback, and travel perks linked to spending.
Coupang WOW, a subscription-based loyalty model, offers premium-tier benefits for a fixed monthly fee, demonstrating the growth of this type of loyalty program in South Korea.

description: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Shinhan Financial (SHG) have what it takes? Let's find out.
